ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the source (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of chart updates (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., top 10, top 100) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last chart update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist who created the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover image */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart used for ranking */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being ranked */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the ranking */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the album in the chart */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the album in the chart */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the ranking is current */,
  "source_reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the source for this ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., moderator, administrator, regular user) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the album (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist's primary genre */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the artist */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genre ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_albums" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the album was added to the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_artists" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "artist_role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the album (e.g., lead vocalist, producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "sub_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_genres_sub_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_genre_id") REFERENCES genre ("genre_id")
)
